title: Gravel's Extended Battles
description: This library mod adds new moves, abilities and types to the Cobblemon mod for use in addons.
body:
# Gravel's Extended Battles
Gravel's Extended Battles is a library mod for Cobblemon that adds new types, moves, abilities, weather and configuration options. None of GEB's battle features are enabled by default; This mod is meant to be used alongside addons that implement the features. This also means that you don't have to play with any features you don't like, like the new types or certain moves and abilities.

## Config features

GEB adds a configuration feature that allows labels to be put on a ban-list. Pokemon with ban-listed labels are not allowed to:
 - Spawn naturally.
 - Be gifted through the giveallpokemon command.
 - Be spawned through the spawnallpokemon command.
 - Be evolved into by Pokemon that haven't been banned.

This means that a ban-listed Pokemon is not obtainable by someone without commands. You can use this to create custom meta-games for your server/world. Or if you are using Gravelmon, you can use it to disable Fakemon from certain fan-games.

### The "not_modeled" Label
A label has been added for Pokemon that do not currently have a model in Cobblemon. This label is on the ban-list by default, but removing it gives you access to placeholder implementations of Pokemon

## Battle features

Gravel's Extended Battles adds plenty of new moves, abilities, and mechanics such as weather to support them from popular Fan-Games like Pokemon Sage, Pokemon Xenoverse, Pokemon Uranium and Pokemon Insurgance amongst others. More documentation on the moves, abilities and weather can be found here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/13nnqgq0oBnpsbjymK5bBvCoXMU2HJYb6Wk7lPVucu4w/edit#gid=0

Do note that not all moves inside this document are implemented, check the changelogs to see which moves/abilities/weathers have been added.

### New types
- Cosmic
- Crystal
- Digital
- Light
- Nuclear
- Plastic
- ???
- Shadow
- Slime
- Sound
- Wind
